form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[凭证号] voucherType[凭证字] voucherDate[凭证日期] voucherNo[凭证编号] orgId[核算组织] acctSchemaId[账套] periodId[会计期间] docStatus[凭证状态] ==========^posting[过账信息]========= postingType[过账类型] isReversed[是否红字冲销凭证] reversalOfVoucherId[原冲销凭证ID] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]
==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[凭证号] voucherType[凭证字] voucherDate[凭证日期] voucherNo[凭证编号] orgId[核算组织] acctSchemaId[账套] periodId[会计期间] docStatus[凭证状态] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
